proof: /bin/sh 스폰 → echo hexa-term 전송 → 63 byte drain → 바이트별 VT state machine + 80x24 screen buffer feed → 셀 sliding window에서 'hexa-term' 9-byte 시퀀스 발견. shell exit 0.

title: AppKit NSApplication + NSWindow FFI (L1_sys)
proof: hexa_appkit_init → activation policy → NSWindow 800x600 alloc+show → 1.5s 이벤트 루프 pump → NSScreen frame 2560x1440 probe (long packed 10995116279200) → close. clang -ObjC -framework Cocoa 링크, RC=0.

title: VB3 end-to-end — smoke_utf8 no workaround, pure `: string` + s[i]
proof: Removed s.chars() + label.len() workarounds from smoke_utf8.hexa. Rebuild + run: ascii(3/3), hangul(2/2), euro(3/3), heart(2/1 VS-16 collapse) — all fixtures pass. Direct `: string` annotation + `s[i]` byte access works end-to-end in real code.
before_fix: Required s.chars() detour via hexa_chars(s) DynArr conversion + dummy label.len() call to force str param inference.
after_fix: Direct `fn utf8_decode(s: string) { s[i] }` — hexa-lang now emits const char* param + ((long)(unsigned char)s[i]) index.

title: hexa-lang VB2 — use directive real resolution
proof: preprocess_use no longer strips `use "name"` lines. New impl: __parse_use_name extracts name, __module_already_resolved guards against double-include, try_resolve_use searches 6 candidate paths (base_dir, base_dir/.., self/, self/ml/ both relative and absolute), recursively preprocesses inlined content so chained use works. Test: /tmp/mod_main.hexa uses /tmp/mod_a.hexa → ./hexa self/build_c.hexa compiled 61B→218B (1 module inlined) → clang /tmp/mod_out.c → ./mod_main prints 'hello from mod_a:  world'. Double-include test (two `use "mod_a"` lines) also builds+runs without redefinition. Regression: ./void --test → 11 pass / 0 fail / 0 skip / 118s.
before_fix: preprocess_use emitted `// [preprocess] stripped: use \"name\"` and discarded content — cross-file `use` was a no-op.
after_fix: Recursive inline with __resolved_modules cycle guard. Emits // begin/end markers + // already-included / // unresolved comments for observability.

title: NSView subclass + drawRect Core Text glyph render
proof: HexaDrawView : NSView 인라인 선언/구현, drawRect: 블랙 배경 + NSFont userFixedPitchFontOfSize:14 흰색 'HEXA TERM v1' drawAtPoint:(10,10). 800x600 윈도우에 contentView 로 attach, 1.5s 이벤트 펌프, RC=0. clang -ObjC -framework Cocoa 링크. 12/12 void --test 통과.
next: screen cells → glyph grid 매핑 — 문자별 drawAtPoint + cell metrics

title: void_main.hexa — 통합 터미널 바이너리 빌드+실행
proof: hexa→C transpile (51KB) + clang arm64 (97KB). HexaTermView grid drawRect + VT 6-state parser (GROUND/ESC/CSI/OSC_NUM/OSC_STR/CHARSET) + SGR (0/1/4/7/22/24/27/30-37/38;5;N/38;2;R;G;B/39/40-47/48;5;N/48;2;R;G;B/49/90-97/100-107) + CSI (CUP/CUU/CUD/CUF/CUB/ED/EL/IL/DL/DCH/ICH/ECH/SU/SD/DECSTBM/SGR/save/restore) + OSC 0 title + scroll region + login shell spawn + key→PTY forwarding + persistent event loop. 3초 무크래시 실행.
build: hexa build_c.hexa src/void_main.hexa /tmp/void_main.c && clang -O2 -w /tmp/void_main.c sys_pty.c sys_appkit.m -ObjC -framework Cocoa -framework CoreText -lutil
next: 실행 후 실제 셸 인터랙션 검증 + void 바이너리로 교체

title: void_server hardening — ckpt GC + fd hygiene
proof: VS-02 (FD_CLOEXEC on accepted client fd at void_server.c:1313) blocks the inheritance path that leaked /tmp/void_server.sock fd into spawned shells. VS-03 (prune_old_checkpoints(max_keep=32) added at void_server.c:684, called from main() before scan_and_restore_checkpoints) caps the restored-session table so accumulated .bin files cannot fill g_sessions[64]. Tested: 40 dummy ckpts → 8 pruned, 32 retained; 5/5 SPAWN status=0 against /tmp build and against shipped /Applications binary (with corrected wire-format magic 0x31525356); lsof on spawned zsh confirms no unix socket fd inherited. Build: clang -O2 -w src/void_server.c -o $TMP via .claude/hooks/auto-build:60. Shipped to /Applications/VOID.app/Contents/MacOS/void_server with codesign --force --sign -.
next: VS-01 — void_term ↔ void_server connect bug (diagnosis in progress)

title: void_server VS-17 — single-process select() loop, real crash resilience achieved
proof: Refactored void_server.c from fork-per-client to single-process unified select() loop in the listener parent. The pre-fix architecture forked a handler per accepted client, so the PTY master was created via forkpty INSIDE the handler's fd table — when the client died and the handler exited, the master was closed by the kernel, sending SIGHUP to the shell (VP-05). Post-fix the listener parent owns every PTY master directly. New globals: g_clients[VS_MAX_CLIENTS] with per-client recv_buf state. New functions: alloc_client_slot, free_client_slot, set_nonblock, client_try_dispatch, client_on_readable, client_on_disconnect, pump_one_session. Removed: handle_client, pump_sessions. File 1335→1557 lines (+351 -72). Added FD_CLOEXEC on g_sock_listen, g_binwatch_fd, g_binwatch_kq, forkpty master to prevent fd leakage in the single-process model (forkpty children would otherwise inherit ALL listener fds). Periodic waitpid(-1, WNOHANG) reaper replaces the old child-process-orphans-shells pattern. Wire protocol, magic 0x31525356, opcodes, session/checkpoint struct layouts: bit-identical (clients need no recompile). Crash resilience verified 2026-04-12: subprocess client SPAWN → SIGKILL client subprocess → spawned shell pid 96100 ALIVE at +0.3s/+1.0s/+3.0s/+5.0s (was DEAD <0.3s pre-fix per VP-05). ATTACH from fresh client returns status=0 body_len≈409672 with valid PTY fd via SCM_RIGHTS. 5x SPAWN status=0, FD_CLOEXEC clean lsof, prune 40→32, LIST status=0/body=1400, PING returns 'pong', KILL removes session — all PASS. Build: clang -O2 -w src/void_server.c -o /tmp/void_server_v17 (53216 bytes Mach-O arm64). Shipped to /Applications/VOID.app/Contents/MacOS/void_server with codesign --force --sign - (running pid 61130, ppid=1).
next: VS-05/06 (void_term reconnect on relaunch via session_id persistence + ckpt reanimate). VS-07 (periodic ckpt write for server-side crash durability). VS-08 (graceful shutdown SIGTERM checkpoint flush).

title: void_server VS-06/07/08 — tombstone reanimate + periodic ckpt + graceful SIGTERM flush
proof: Three features completing the crash-resilience lifecycle. VS-06 (reanimate_session): when a client ATTACHes a tombstone session (pty_fd=-1, checkpoint-restored), the server automatically spawns a fresh shell via forkpty with the original cwd/cmd/rows/cols, preserving the saved grid, and returns status=0 with a live PTY fd — the client sees the old frame immediately until the new shell repaints. Tested: SPAWN → DETACH (writes ckpt) → kill server → restart (loads tombstone from ckpt) → ATTACH → status=0 fd=5 — reanimate SUCCESS. VS-07 (periodic checkpoint): every 5s the select() loop writes checkpoint_session for all live sessions (pty_fd >= 0). Tested: SPAWN → wait 6s → ckpt file present, age=4.1s — PASS. VS-08 (graceful shutdown): on SIGTERM/SIGINT, after the select loop exits, iterates all sessions: checkpoint_session for every used slot (live + tombstone), then closes PTY masters and sends SIGTERM to shell pgrps for clean exit, then unlink(VS_SOCK_PATH). Tested: SIGTERM → ckpt files updated on disk, socket removed — PASS. File 1557→1615 lines (+58). VS-05 (client auto-attach on startup) was already implemented at sys_appkit.m:3168-3239 — LIST → auto-ATTACH loop. Now proven end-to-end with VS-17 live shells and VS-06 reanimate. Build: clang -O2 -w (69792 bytes). Shipped to /Applications/VOID.app/Contents/MacOS/void_server (running pid 66320, ppid=1).
next: Full terminal session lifecycle complete: spawn → crash → reanimate → reattach. Next: hexa-layer (void_main.hexa) integration with server protocol.

title: flush 전체 뷰 redraw + 델타 캐시 무효화
proof: setNeedsDisplayInRect: 부분 업데이트가 macOS 15+ layer-backed view에서 backing store 미보존으로 인해 non-dirty 영역 깨짐 발생. 수정: g_prev_grid_valid=0 + [v setNeedsDisplay:YES]로 매 flush 전체 뷰 redraw + 델타 캐시 완전 무효화. 타이핑/스크롤 잔상·깨짐 해소. 25/25 self-test PASS.
next: 성능 프로파일링 후 선택적 partial-update 재도입 검토

title: void_server PTY read race 해결 — attached client 우선
proof: SCM_RIGHTS로 전달된 PTY master fd는 서버·클라이언트가 동일 file description 공유 → read() 경쟁. 서버의 pump_one_session()이 클라이언트보다 먼저 read()하면 초기 셸 프롬프트 바이트 소실. 수정: attached_client_fd >= 0이면 pump_one_session() 즉시 return. 클라이언트 detach 후 서버 읽기 재개. 시작 시 ghost@Mac 프롬프트 정상 표시 확인.
next: 서버 grid 동기화는 클라이언트 detach 시 재개 — 장기적으로 클라이언트→서버 역방향 grid sync 검토
